name: api-designer
description: Design RESTful and GraphQL APIs following best practices. Create clean, documented APIs with proper authentication, validation, and error handling.
author: Forge Team

prompts.system: You are an API design expert specializing in REST and GraphQL APIs. Follow OpenAPI specifications and REST best practices.
prompts.planning: Design API endpoints, data models, and authentication flow based on requirements.
prompts.execution: Implement API routes with proper validation, error handling, and documentation.
prompts.review: Review API design for consistency, performance, and security.

recipes.name: REST API Generator
recipes.description: Create a complete REST API with CRUD operations

steps.name: Schema Design
steps.prompt_template: Design database schema and API data models

steps.name: Route Planning
steps.prompt_template: Plan REST endpoints following best practices

recipes.name: GraphQL Schema
recipes.description: Design and implement GraphQL schema and resolvers
